mapper.sql: room_id, seq, message_id, from_user_id, content, client_msg_id, created_at
mapper.insert: insert into im_room_message(room_id, seq, message_id, from_user_id, content, client_msg_id, created_at) values ( #{roomId, jdbcType=BINARY}, #{seq}, #{messageId, jdbcType=BINARY}, #{fromUserId, jdbcType=BINARY}, #{content}, #{clientMsgId}, #{createdAt} )
